title: stenolobium sambucifolium
intro: Stenolobium sambucifolium, also known as the elderflower tree or elder tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and flu. The health benefits of Stenolobium sambucifolium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Stenolobium sambucifolium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent.
